scripts.build: npm --prefix src/frontend run build && npm --prefix src/backend run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix src/backend run lint && npm --prefix src/frontend run lint
scripts.test:ci: npm run lint && npm run build && npm --prefix src/backend run test:ci && npm --prefix src/frontend run test:ci && sh -c 'if [ "$RUN_E2E" = "1" ]; then npm run e2e; fi'
